title: Email notifications for expiring service principal tokens (Beta) ​
body:
**June 12, 2026**

Databricks now automatically sends email notifications to workspace admins when a service principal token is within seven days of expiring. This feature is in Beta. Notifications are sent for tokens with a lifetime greater than seven days that have been used at least once. No configuration is required. See [Monitor and revoke personal access tokens](/aws/en/admin/access-control/tokens).
